**Step 1: Prioritize Explicit Diagnostic Coding for Lipid Abnormalities (Primary Evidence)**
I reviewed the 'Diagnoses made' section of the [Current Visit Record]. The diagnoses listed are: Hypotension of hemodialysis; End stage renal disease; Mechanical complication of other vascular device, implant, and graft; Hypertensive chronic kidney disease, unspecified, with chronic kidney disease stage V or end stage renal disease; Unspecified protein-calorie malnutrition; Unspecified osteomyelitis, pelvic region and thigh; Pyogenic arthritis, forearm; Endocarditis, valve unspecified, unspecified cause; Chronic diastolic heart failure; Congestive heart failure, unspecified; Hypovolemia; Mitral and aortic valve diseases, unspecified; Coronary atherosclerosis of unspecified type of vessel, native or graft; Atrial fibrillation; Attention to other artificial opening of digestive tract; Anemia, unspecified; Hypercalcemia; Disorders of phosphorus metabolism; Diarrhea; Carrier or suspected carrier of Methicillin resistant Staphylococcus aureus; Other disorders of calcium metabolism; Chondrocalcinosis, unspecified, forearm.
